title: Protection of critical habitat - Canada.ca
content:
## Protection of critical habitat
Under the Act, the Minister must provide a statement and/or progress report on any unprotected portions of a wildlife species critical habitat. This would be required if he/she was of the opinion that the critical habitat remained unprotected after being identified in a recovery strategy or action plan. The Minister must continue to report every subsequent 180 day period, until the portion is protected or no longer identified as critical habitat.
